# Florida Pole Barn
> Florida's trusted pole barn kit supplier serving all of Central Florida and statewide. We provide custom pole barn kits for horse barns, equipment storage, RV & boat storage, workshops, garages, and agricultural buildings.

## About
- Company: Florida Pole Barn
- Location: Minneola, FL (Central Florida)
- Service Area: All of Florida
- Products: Open pole barn kits, enclosed pole barn kits
- Services: Custom pole barn design, kit delivery, construction
